audience: Self-employed professionals, SMEs and marketing teams preparing their websites to become trustworthy sources for generative search experiences
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Een KMO uitleggen hoe retrieval, bronwaardigheid, citeerbare informatie en platformtoegang de zichtbaarheid in generatieve antwoorden kunnen beïnvloeden

searchIntent.question: What is Generative Engine Optimisation and how can an SME make its website retrievable, understandable and citeable in generative answers?
searchIntent.geographicContext: English-speaking SMEs in Limburg, Belgium and the wider international web market

longTailKeywords: how to get cited in AI answers
directAnswer: GEO stands for Generative Engine Optimisation: preparing a website so generative systems can retrieve relevant pages, understand their information and potentially cite them as sources. It builds on SEO while adding attention to retrieval, source quality, citeable claims, entities and platform access. GEO cannot buy or guarantee a citation.
title: What is GEO? Becoming retrievable and citeable in generative answers
metaDescription: What is GEO? Learn how retrieval, source quality, platform crawlers, citations and measurement support citeable AI content without hacks or guarantees.
h1: What is GEO? Becoming retrievable and citeable in generative answers

internalLinks.anchor: appearing in Google, ChatGPT and AI search results
local SEO for SMEs in Limburg
complete guide to building a website

factsToPreserve: GEO cannot buy, force or guarantee a citation on any generative platform
The GEO paper was submitted in November 2023 and accepted at KDD 2024; its reported improvements of up to 40 percent belong to a specific experimental benchmark and are not a general promise
Google may use query fan-out in AI Overviews and AI Mode
A Google supporting-link candidate must be indexed and allowed to show a Search snippet, but inclusion is not guaranteed and no extra AI technical requirement exists
Google says no special AI schema or machine-readable AI file is required for its AI features
OAI-SearchBot and GPTBot are independent controls for ChatGPT Search and potential model training respectively
OpenAI says a Search robots change may take about 24 hours to process
Robots.txt may not apply to user-initiated ChatGPT-User actions
Bing AI Performance metrics do not establish the position, authority or role a page had in one answer
No available dashboard captures the complete generative landscape, and no metric is a universal GEO score
This content distinguishes citations from authority, rankings, traffic, conversions and revenue
